issues.detail: Skill does not cover error handling or edge cases.
Skill assumes a Node.js/TypeScript environment, limiting cross-platform applicability.

scenarios.name: Add faceted blog search with typo tolerance to a docs site
scenarios.rationale: Treatment defines a schema with enum/string[]/number types, calls create+insert+search from @orama/orama, and uses where+facets with ranges for the filter UI; baseline reaches for Algolia/Lunr or invents a generic API surface.

scenarios.name: Hybrid semantic + keyword search over Kubernetes documentation
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses @orama/plugin-embeddings with pluginEmbeddings, declares a vector[384] field, and calls search with mode: 'hybrid' plus a similarity threshold; baseline stitches together a separate vector DB and BM25 library without the single hybrid mode.
